creator: elehack@gmail.com
text:
I've installed jabber in a jail and it fails to start.  Running jabberd14 with -D I see the follwoing error:

Executing jsm() in /usr/local/lib/jabber/libjabberdsm.so failed: 'Undefined symbol "_nss_cache_cycle_prevention_function"'

Invalid configuration in instance 'sessions.elehack.net:

Fix: 

References to this problem with other software indicates that it is a problem in how the dynamic loader is used.
How-To-Repeat: Install net-im/jabber on a 7.2 AMD-64 system (may apply to other platforms as well, I do not know) and try to run it with the 'libjabberdsm' JSM loaded.
